name: Monthly Collection Forecast
query:
SELECT
    si.customer,
    si.name as invoice,
    si.grand_total as amount,
    si.due_date as expected_collection_date,
    MONTH(si.due_date) as collection_month,
    YEAR(si.due_date) as collection_year
FROM `tabSales Invoice` si
WHERE
    si.docstatus = 1
    AND si.outstanding_amount > 0
    AND si.due_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s
ORDER BY si.due_date ASC
